runtime.help_excerpt:
Create, validate, and freeze column-scoping profiles

Usage: profile [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

Inspect the profile CLI contract without reading profile or dataset files

Usage: profile doctor [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

Report read-only health and boundary checks

Usage: profile doctor health [OPTIONS]

Report the supported doctor contract and domain boundaries

Usage: profile doctor capabilities [OPTIONS]

Print concise usage guidance for headless agents

Usage: profile doctor robot-docs [OPTIONS]

Print the machine-readable profile capability contract

Usage: profile capabilities [OPTIONS]

Print paste-ready operating notes for agents

Usage: profile robot-docs [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]

Print the agent operating guide

Usage: profile robot-docs guide [OPTIONS]

Create draft profiles from templates or dataset headers

Usage: profile draft [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

Create a blank draft profile template

Usage: profile draft new [OPTIONS] --out <OUT>

Create a draft profile from a dataset header

Usage: profile draft init [OPTIONS] --out <OUT> <DATASET>

Validate a profile against the schema

Usage: profile validate [OPTIONS] <FILE>

Validate a profile and check column presence against a dataset

Usage: profile lint [OPTIONS] --against <AGAINST> <PROFILE>

Apply witnessed pre-parse slicing to a CSV-like dataset

Usage: profile slice [OPTIONS] <FILE>

Show structural statistics for a dataset

Usage: profile stats [OPTIONS] <DATASET>

Rank candidate key columns by uniqueness

Usage: profile suggest-key [OPTIONS] <DATASET>

Freeze a draft into an immutable, content-addressed profile

Usage: profile freeze [OPTIONS] --family <FAMILY> --version <VERSION> --out <OUT> <DRAFT>

List available frozen profiles

Usage: profile list [OPTIONS]

Show a resolved profile by ID

Usage: profile show [OPTIONS] <PROFILE_ID>

Diff two profile versions

Usage: profile diff [OPTIONS] <A> <B>

Emit a profile.discovery.v0 candidate template from a successful sliced CSV

Usage: profile emit-discovery [OPTIONS] --source-file <SOURCE_FILE> --skip-rows <SKIP_ROWS> <SLICED_CSV>

Publish a frozen profile to data-fabric (deferred in v0.1)

Usage: profile push [OPTIONS] <FILE>

Fetch a frozen profile by ID from data-fabric (deferred in v0.1)

Usage: profile pull [OPTIONS] --out <OUT> <PROFILE_ID>

Query the witness ledger

Usage: profile witness [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

Search witness records with optional limit

Usage: profile witness query [OPTIONS]

Show the most recent witness records

Usage: profile witness last [OPTIONS]

Count total witness records

Usage: profile witness count [OPTIONS]
